tasks.check: deno fmt --check && deno lint && deno check src/main.ts scripts/build.ts scripts/setup.ts scripts/serve.ts
tasks.test:honeycomb: deno task build && deno test --allow-read --allow-write=/tmp --allow-net=127.0.0.1:8091 --allow-env --allow-run --allow-sys tests/honeycomb_behavior_test.ts
tasks.ci: deno task check && deno task test && deno task build
tasks.serve: deno task build && deno run --allow-read=dist --allow-net=127.0.0.1:8080 scripts/serve.ts
